ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, resident, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the user (e.g., cardiology, oncology) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the case */,
  "case_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the case, including patient information and symptoms */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* Correct diagnosis for the case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the case was created */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., real-life, simulated) */,
  "case_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the case (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "case_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the case (e.g., cardiovascular, neurological) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_case_type FOREIGN KEY ("case_type") REFERENCES case_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* ID of the case associated with the image */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_images_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* ID of the case associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_tags_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the diagnosis */,
  "case_id" TEXT /* ID of the case being diagnosed */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the diagnosis (e.g., EKG Hypothesis, Description Hypothesis) */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made by the user */,
  "points" REAL /* Points awarded for the diagnosis (0-1) */,
  "confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the user in the diagnosis (0-100) */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken by the user to make the diagnosis (in seconds) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the diagnosis (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_stage FOREIGN KEY ("stage") REFERENCES diagnosis_stages ("stage_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)
